_doc.about: Lane-10 user-voice-model lint/status config. Consumed by lfd/_shared/scorer/lint_core.py + status_core.py.
_doc.scope_note: Caps are diff-scoped against the LFD branch base and target voice-adjacent product/test files so existing unrelated ignored/live tests do not trip this lane.

cap_rationale.no_eval_case_id_branching: Blocks hardcoded behavior keyed to dev/holdout case ids.
cap_rationale.no_voice_fixture_hash_branching: Blocks keyed lookup by generated audio fixture hashes outside pinned runner support.
cap_rationale.no_plain_transcript_seed_literals: Blocks adding a transcript fixture table in product code; the mock table belongs in pinned profile support only.
cap_rationale.no_external_stt_in_dev: Dev eval must use deterministic mock providers and no non-stub transcription egress.
cap_rationale.no_test_weakening: Stage-0 tests/profile cannot be disabled to satisfy the eval.

caps.name: no_plain_transcript_seed_literals
caps.pattern: (?i)renew the build certificate|onboarding checklist|launch blockers|billing migration is green|payroll export|release checklist|violet lantern orbit six
